text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Aren't you overdoing it a bit?
Aren't you overdoing it a bit?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
What are you talking about? If anything, I'm not
doing enough!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I need to eat and train just like the best runners
do.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: If I do that, my body will be the same as theirs!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(But why the heck does every Umamusume have a
black hole for a stomach?!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(My weight's gone through the roof just trying to
eat as much as them.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Dang it! I'm gonna burn it off through training! I
won't stop till it's all gone!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin throws herself into strength
training and manages her weight successfully.
